_comment: MCP server configurations for ROS 2 development with Claude Code.
_usage: Copy desired entries into your ~/.claude.json mcpServers section.

ros2-docs._description: Search ROS 2 documentation (docs.ros.org). Useful for distro-specific API lookups.

filesystem-ros2-workspace._description: Give Claude Code access to your ROS 2 workspace.
filesystem-ros2-workspace._setup: Replace /home/user/ros2_ws with your actual workspace path.

github-ros2._description: Search GitHub for ROS 2 package examples and issues.

sequential-thinking._description: Multi-step reasoning for complex ROS 2 architecture decisions.

memory._description: Persist ROS 2 project context across sessions (robot name, distro, custom topics).

_ros2_context_to_store_in_memory._description: Use the memory MCP server to store these project-specific facts
examples: Robot name: my_robot, base_frame: base_link, laser_frame: laser_link
Using FastDDS with custom config at /etc/ros2/fastdds.xml
Nav2 config: smac_hybrid planner + regulated_pure_pursuit controller
Multi-robot: robot1, robot2 — each has own namespace
